mapper.insert: insert into employee(name, username, password, phone, sex, id_number, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) value (#{name},#{username},#{password},#{phone},#{sex},#{idNumber},#{status},#{createTime},#{updateTime},#{createUser},#{updateUser});
mapper.select:
select * from employee
and name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
order by create_time desc
